summary: Java 12 (não-LTS) traz Switch Expressions (preview), Shenandoah GC (experimental) e melhorias em G1.

jeps.title: Shenandoah: A Low-Pause-Time Garbage Collector (Experimental)
jeps.description: Estreia experimental do Shenandoah GC, alternativa de baixa pausa.

jeps.title: Microbenchmark Suite
jeps.description: Suite JMH oficial no OpenJDK para benchmarks.

jeps.title: Switch Expressions (Preview)
jeps.description: Primeira preview da nova sintaxe switch com arrow.

jeps.title: JVM Constants API
jeps.description: API para representar constantes do pool em runtime.

jeps.title: One AArch64 Port, Not Two
jeps.description: Unifica os dois ports ARM64, simplificando manutenção.

jeps.title: Default CDS Archives
jeps.description: Gera arquivos CDS por padrão, acelerando startup.

jeps.title: Abortable Mixed Collections for G1
jeps.description: G1 pode abortar mixed collection que exceder pause target.

jeps.title: Promptly Return Unused Committed Memory from G1
jeps.description: G1 devolve memória idle ao SO.
